channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: OpenAPI Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The core domain responsible for defining the RESTful API structure and data contracts for the Supermodel ecosystem. Architectural overview of the OpenAPI domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SupermodelRegistry Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: The configuration and metadata domain that manages how the specification is published and consumed within the npm ecosystem. Architectural overview of the SupermodelRegistry domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
